rationale: The nested Serviceos/ tree is the primary workspace: npm workspaces in package.json, Playwright/e2e, and deployment docs reference Serviceos/packages/api. Serviceos-1 is a divergent full copy and must not receive parallel fixes without an explicit merge.
mergeGuidance: Port features from Serviceos-1 only after reviewing each onlyInFork path. Prefer git merge or cherry-pick over copying files. Retire Serviceos-1 once parity is confirmed or archive outside the active workspace.
serviceOsAppNote: Next.js service-os-app customer routes proxy to packages/api (SERVICE_OS_API_URL). Invoice and agent routes remain on Supabase or external services where Express contracts differ; see route file comments.

siblingCloneConsolidation.notes: Serviceos-1 is a second clone of the same GitHub repo (joshrkay/Serviceos). Unique local work was committed on wip/rescue-serviceos-1-local. Canonical repo has remote 'serviceos1' and has fetched that branch. Run tools/consolidate-sibling-clone.sh merge when ready (expect conflicts with local WIP on main). After merge and push: optional tools/consolidate-sibling-clone.sh remove-serviceos1 (destructive).
